bg_mode_note: icon = magenta chromakey → transparent RGBA; photo = solid non-magenta background for UI-matted frames (override color via style_modifiers)
gen_strategy_note: Seed pinned per character; varying only the emotion_description placeholder across 7 passes holds identity.

neutral.frame_hint: eyes level, mouth closed, shoulders relaxed, neutral resting face

happy.frame_hint: genuine smile, eyes slightly narrowed in warmth, shoulders slightly raised

sad.frame_hint: sad expression, eyebrows angled upward-inward, mouth downturned slightly, shoulders slumped

angry.frame_hint: angry expression, brows furrowed deeply, mouth tight and downturned, jaw set, shoulders tensed forward

surprised.frame_hint: surprised expression, eyebrows raised high, mouth open in O-shape, eyes wide

determined.frame_hint: determined expression, brows set firmly, mouth set with slight clench, eyes focused and forward

hurt.frame_hint: hurt expression, one eye partially closed in pain, mouth strained, shoulders flinched protectively

ernie_call_count.note: One call per emotion. Seed is pinned per character; same seed reused across all 7 to preserve identity.
